capabilityStatement.overview: Veraqor, Inc. is a technology consulting firm focused on digital transformation through cloud, data, and artificial intelligence solutions. The company provides consulting and implementation services that help organizations design, build, and manage data-driven platforms and intelligent applications. Veraqor supports enterprises in modernizing technology environments and leveraging analytics and AI to improve operational decision-making.
coreCompetencies: Artificial intelligence and machine learning solution development
Cloud migration and modernization services
Data management
analytics
and business intelligence solutions
Enterprise application and digital platform development
services: AI and applied AI solution development
Data analytics and business intelligence consulting
capabilityStatement.industries: Retail, Life Sciences, Manufacturing, Oil & Gas, Government and Public Services
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Veraqor focuses on integrating cloud, data, and AI technologies to support enterprise digital transformation initiatives. The company operates with a Data and AI Center of Excellence model to guide strategy, governance, and implementation of intelligent data platforms. Veraqor delivers consulting, development, and operational support services designed to help organizations operationalize data and AI solutions across business functions.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: Examples of solution implementations referenced on the website include AI, data, and cloud-based technology solutions associated with organizations such as ASOS, Migros, PepsiCo, Shell, Airbus, and GE Aviation. These examples describe technology use cases involving machine learning models, predictive analytics, and digital transformation initiatives.
capabilityStatement.certifications: No certifications or compliance details are publicly listed.

capabilityStatement.overview: ZEDventures, Inc. is an enterprise technology solutions and services provider focused on helping organizations modernize IT environments and leverage data for improved decision-making. The company delivers end-to-end technology solutions including cloud services, data analytics, and enterprise application support. Its services are designed to help organizations improve operational efficiency, reduce costs, and enable digital transformation initiatives.
coreCompetencies: Enterprise technology consulting and implementation
Enterprise data analytics and business intelligence solutions
Cloud services and infrastructure enablement
Application development
modernization
and managed services
services: Application development and managed application services
capabilityStatement.industries: High Technology, Aerospace, Chemicals, Oil and Gas, Utilities
capabilityStatement.differentiators: ZEDventures provides end-to-end enterprise technology services covering consulting, implementation, and ongoing application management. The company emphasizes flexible engagement models including strategic staffing, co-sourcing, fixed-deliverable projects, and managed services to support varying client delivery needs. It also focuses on helping organizations derive actionable insights from enterprise data through analytics, dashboards, and reporting capabilities.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The company has supported projects involving data governance, business intelligence, and advanced analytics initiatives for organizations in industries including aerospace, chemicals, oil and gas, and high technology.
capabilityStatement.certifications: No certifications or compliance details are publicly listed.

capabilityStatement.overview: NIX United is a global software engineering company providing custom software development, IT consulting, and technology outsourcing services. Founded in 1994, the company supports organizations in designing, building, and scaling digital products through a structured offshore delivery model and multidisciplinary engineering teams. NIX delivers software solutions across multiple technology domains including AI, cloud, and enterprise platforms.
coreCompetencies: Custom software engineering and enterprise application development
Web and mobile application development
Artificial intelligence and data science solutions
Cloud engineering and DevOps implementation
services: Custom software development and product engineering
UX/UI design and quality assurance testing
capabilityStatement.industries: Healthcare & Life Sciences, Finance & Banking, Insurance, Education, E-commerce
capabilityStatement.differentiators: NIX utilizes a proven offshore delivery model with globally distributed engineering teams to support scalable software development and long-term product lifecycle support. The company provides multidisciplinary technical expertise across AI, cloud, data engineering, and enterprise software platforms, enabling clients to build and maintain complex digital solutions.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The company reports delivering 3,000+ software projects for global clients, including enterprise and Fortune 500 organizations across multiple industries such as healthcare and finance. Specific client names are not publicly disclosed on the website.
capabilityStatement.certifications: Microsoft Solutions Partner for Infrastructure (Azure), AWS RDS Service Delivery Partner, ISTQB Certified Software Testing Professionals

capabilityStatement.overview: Wakefly, Inc. is a U.S.-based digital experience and web development firm providing website design, development, digital marketing, and hosting services. Founded in 2002, the company supports organizations in building and managing modern web platforms that improve online presence, user experience, and lead generation. Wakefly delivers end-to-end services covering website strategy, development, digital marketing, and ongoing site support.
coreCompetencies: Custom website design and development
Digital marketing and lead generation strategy including PPC and SEO
Content management system (CMS) implementation and integration
Website hosting
DevOps
and ongoing site management
services: Digital marketing and lead generation services
capabilityStatement.industries: Banking and credit unions, Healthcare and life sciences, High technology, Engineering and manufacturing, Non-profit organizations, Transportation and logistics
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Wakefly provides integrated web development and digital marketing services, supporting organizations from initial website design through deployment and ongoing operational support. The firm combines development, marketing strategy, and cloud hosting capabilities to deliver scalable websites and digital platforms aligned with business objectives.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The company website references projects involving website design, CMS implementation, upgrades, and digital experience improvements for organizations such as Gogo, ECHO, National Association of Independent Colleges and Universities (NAICU), Health Plans, Inc., HarborOne Bank, and Atlas Van Lines.
capabilityStatement.certifications: Kentico Gold Partner and Kentico Quality Expert partner status are referenced on the website.

capabilityStatement.overview: Apolis is a global IT consultancy that provides technology consulting, managed services, and IT staffing solutions. The company integrates technology specialists and enterprise solutions into client organizations to support technology implementation, operations, and workforce needs. Apolis delivers services across enterprise applications, cloud platforms, and digital development environments.
coreCompetencies: Enterprise application implementation and support (Oracle and SAP)
Cloud hosting and infrastructure solutions
IT staffing and workforce solutions
Web and mobile application development with DevOps and QA support
services: ERP implementation and managed application services
IT staffing and workforce management solutions
capabilityStatement.industries: Automotive, Manufacturing, Distribution & Logistics, Retail & Consumer Products, Financial Services
capabilityStatement.differentiators:
Provides a combined model of IT consulting, enterprise application services, and IT workforce solutions to support both technology delivery and staffing requirements.
Operates with a global delivery model and a network of consultants supporting enterprise technology implementations and managed services.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The company website references engagements with organizations including 3M, Nestlé, Qualcomm, Toyota, Toyota Financial Services, Bank of the West, Boingo, Kyocera, Toshiba Medical Systems, Carvana, Evite, and Miramax.
capabilityStatement.certifications: No certifications or compliance details are publicly listed.

capabilityStatement.overview: ControlCase is a U.S.-based provider of cybersecurity, certification, and continuous compliance services headquartered in Fairfax, Virginia. The company offers technology-enabled compliance solutions, audits, and managed services to help organizations meet regulatory and security standards across on-premises and cloud environments. Their services focus on governance, risk management, and compliance (GRC) for organizations operating under multiple regulatory frameworks.
coreCompetencies: Compliance-as-a-Service (CaaS) for ongoing regulatory monitoring and reporting
Cybersecurity and compliance assessments across multiple regulatory frameworks
IT governance
risk management
and compliance (GRC) consulting and solutions
Security testing including vulnerability assessments and penetration testing
services: Managed compliance and continuous monitoring services
Security testing and vulnerability assessment services
capabilityStatement.industries: Financial Services & Payment Processing, Government & Public Sector, Healthcare, Technology & Cloud Service Providers, Retail & E-commerce
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Provides a Compliance-as-a-Service (CaaS) model combining technology platforms with managed services to automate compliance monitoring and evidence collection. The company’s approach includes solutions such as a unified audit model that maps evidence across multiple regulatory frameworks to reduce duplication of compliance activities. It supports organizations operating in regulated environments through global delivery capabilities and experience across multiple regulatory standards.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The website references support for organizations globally and indicates that more than 400 companies across 40+ countries have used ControlCase services. Specific project engagements or contract performance details are not publicly disclosed.
capabilityStatement.certifications: PCI DSS (QSA and ASV services), ISO 27001 assessments, SOC 1 and SOC 2 assessments, HITRUST certification support, HIPAA assessments, GDPR assessments, FedRAMP services, CSA STAR certification, CMMC and NIST framework support.

capabilityStatement.overview: Federal Engineering, Inc. is an independent public safety communications consulting firm specializing in the planning, design, and implementation of critical communications systems for government and public service organizations. Founded in 1983, the firm provides advisory and lifecycle support services for emergency communications infrastructure, including 9-1-1 systems, land mobile radio networks, and emergency operations centers. Their work focuses on helping jurisdictions design, procure, and implement reliable communications systems for first responders and public safety agencies.
coreCompetencies: Public safety communications system planning and design
Next Generation 9-1-1 (NG911) and PSAP consulting
Land Mobile Radio (LMR) system engineering and modernization
Communications infrastructure procurement and implementation advisory
services: Public safety communications consulting and lifecycle support
Emergency communications center and 9-1-1 system planning and implementation
Land mobile radio and wireless communications system consulting
capabilityStatement.industries: Public Safety and Emergency Services, Government (Federal / State / Local), Transportation, Utilities, Critical Infrastructure
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Federal Engineering operates as an independent consulting firm that is not affiliated with equipment manufacturers or service providers, allowing the firm to provide objective technical recommendations and procurement guidance. The company provides full lifecycle advisory services from needs assessment and system design to procurement support and implementation for mission-critical communications systems used by public safety and government organizations.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The firm has completed thousands of communications projects for government and public safety organizations across all 50 U.S. states and Canada. Publicly referenced engagements include consulting support for radio communications systems, CAD/RMS modernization, emergency communications center consolidation assessments, and Next Generation 9-1-1 initiatives for state and local jurisdictions.
capabilityStatement.certifications: No certifications or compliance details are publicly listed.

technologies: Cloud Platforms like AWS/Azure/ Google Cloud

capabilityStatement.overview: Keyhole Software is a U.S.-based software development and consulting firm that provides enterprise application development, cloud engineering, and legacy system modernization services. Founded in 2008, the company delivers custom software solutions through senior-level, U.S.-based consultants who integrate with client teams to design, build, and modernize mission-critical systems.
coreCompetencies: Custom enterprise software development
Cloud migration and cloud-native application engineering
Legacy system modernization and application refactoring
DevOps automation and CI/CD implementation
capabilityStatement.industries: Healthcare, Financial Services, Insurance, Manufacturing, Logistics
capabilityStatement.differentiators:
•	Delivery through senior-level consultants with an average of 17+ years of software development experience. 
•	100% U.S.-based employee consultants with no offshore or subcontracted staffing model. 
•	Flexible engagement models including project outsourcing, staff augmentation, and advisory consulting. 
•	Focus on long-term client relationships and knowledge transfer to internal client teams.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance:
•	Provides custom software consulting services for organizations ranging from startups to Fortune 500 and Global 1000 companies.
•	Experience modernizing mission-critical systems for sectors including healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, logistics, and insurance.
capabilityStatement.certifications: Microsoft Gold Partner (as referenced on company website services content), AWS Consulting Partner (as referenced on company website services content).

capabilityStatement.overview: Capitol Tech Solutions (CTS) is a technology consulting and digital transformation firm headquartered in Sacramento, California. The company provides software development, data science, and user experience services to businesses, nonprofit organizations, and government agencies. CTS focuses on delivering technology solutions that support digital operations, data-driven decision-making, and modern web platforms.
coreCompetencies: Custom Software Application Development and System Implementation
Web and User Experience (UX) Design and Development
Data Science and Data Visualization Solutions
Application Code Review and Technical Assessment Services
services: Custom Software Development and Application Engineering
Managed IT Support and Technical Environment Monitoring
capabilityStatement.industries: Technology, Healthcare, Finance, Education, Public Sector / Government
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Capitol Tech Solutions delivers end-to-end technology services, managing the full software development lifecycle from requirements definition through implementation, testing, and maintenance. The firm combines software engineering, data analytics, and user experience design to support digital transformation initiatives for public and private sector organizations. Its engagement model emphasizes tailored technical solutions aligned to each client’s operational requirements.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: Capitol Tech Solutions has supported projects involving data reporting and visualization for organizations working with the California Department of Public Health and the California Governor’s Office. The company has also delivered custom software, web development, and digital strategy solutions for organizations across nonprofit, political, and business sectors.
capabilityStatement.certifications: Microsoft Solutions Partner - Digital & App Innovation (as referenced on company website).

capabilityStatement.overview: GenSigma LLC is a technology services and workforce solutions provider founded in 2015 and headquartered in San Francisco, California. The company delivers AI-driven technology services, data and cloud solutions, and IT staffing support to government agencies and commercial organizations. GenSigma focuses on helping organizations modernize systems, leverage data for decision-making, and build scalable technology teams.

Cloud infrastructure and digital modernization services
Data analytics and data architecture modernization
IT staffing and workforce augmentation for government and commercial organizations
services: Digital modernization and enterprise application development
Data analytics and data infrastructure modernization
IT staffing and workforce augmentation services
capabilityStatement.industries: Government & Public Sector, Healthcare, Energy & Industrial, Technology & Media, Commercial Enterprises
capabilityStatement.differentiators: GenSigma combines technology consulting, AI-driven solutions, and workforce services to support digital transformation initiatives. The company emphasizes modernization of legacy systems, cloud adoption, and data-driven decision-making through integrated technology and staffing support models.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: The website indicates that GenSigma provides IT services and staffing support to federal, state, city, and local government agencies, as well as commercial organizations. Specific project references or client names are not publicly disclosed.
